blockingFindings: Contract mismatch: required work-surface fields still use Zod .default(...) in apps/platform/shared/contracts/process-work-surface.ts (including source accessMode at line 328), violating the no-defaults-on-required-fields rule.
nonblockingFindings: No `.catch(() => {})` silent-swallow pattern found in process-environment.service.ts fire-and-forget lanes.
summary: Both requested gates passed (verify + integration), and structural runtime/schema checks align with Epic 3 core contract for real provider/writer wiring, ExecutionResult shape, durable accessMode/contentStorageId fields, fingerprint compute-on-write, read-time fingerprint comparison, and controls-driven client rendering. The remaining blocker is unresolved required-field defaults in process-work-surface Zod schemas, so this needs a revise pass before ship.
